criteria.criterion: A configured user starts with repository, task, optional Details, and Run safely.
evidence: components/villani-web/e2e/pt2-loop.spec.ts: PT2 clean success uses four canonical stages and safe defaults

criteria.criterion: Strongest eligible, Performance, mandatory verification, no default wall-time, and non-destructive delivery are the shared defaults.
evidence: Villani Ops final suite: 1164 passed, 2 skipped, 114 deselected

criteria.criterion: Canonical events project to exactly Understanding, Working, Checking, and Ready without frontend timers or percentages.
Every terminal result has exactly one public verdict and unproved, stale, unselected, or accepted-unverified work cannot be delivered.
evidence: components/villani-ops/villani_ops/tests/closed_loop/test_product_run.py: contract rejects delivery action for unproved verdict
components/villani-web/e2e/pt2-loop.spec.ts: missing evidence and target drift scenarios
Villani Ops final suite: 1164 passed, 2 skipped, 114 deselected

criteria.criterion: CLI and web consume the same villani.product_run.v1 projection.
evidence: Villani Run Model: TypeScript build and no-emit checks passed; 5 tests passed

criteria.criterion: Cancellation, refresh reconnection, and idempotent submission preserve evidence and do not turn browser closure into cancellation.
evidence: components/villani-agentd/tests/test_console.py: cancellation, idempotency, and event endpoint tests

criteria.criterion: Repository discovery is cached and cancellable, task submission is one-click/idempotent, and running prefers event subscription.
evidence: components/villani-agentd/tests/test_console.py: repository-fingerprint cache and HTTP event subscription
Villani Web Playwright suite: 37 passed in 11.1 seconds

criteria.criterion: Explicit failure states disclose what happened, target modification state, and one recovery action while preserving unknown cost/duration.
All required PT2 end-to-end scenarios and deterministic stage/verdict screenshots are present.
evidence: Packaged Console parity: 3 files verified and 2 byte-parity tests passed

criteria.criterion: Existing bundles remain readable, delivery remains fail closed, semantic verification inputs remain blind, and PT3 was not started.
evidence: CANCELLED is additive to the durable run-state enum
PT3 files and behavior were not introduced

environment_limitations: The in-app Browser connector reported no attached browsers; the repository Playwright/Chromium harness supplied deterministic browser evidence instead.
The standalone villani-run-model package has no local TypeScript binary installed; its source was compiled and tested with the pinned villani-web TypeScript/Vitest binaries.
